content.explanation:
**Tenses Part 1 — Simple Tenses (Simple Present, Simple Past, Simple Future):**

Tense बताता है कि कोई action **कब** होता है — Past, Present, या Future में।

**1. Simple Present Tense (वर्तमान काल — सामान्य):**
Use: Daily habits, facts, general truths
🇮🇳 मैं रोज़ काम पर जाता हूँ।
🇬🇧 I **go** to work every day.
Formula: Subject + V1 (He/She/It → V1+s)

**2. Simple Past Tense (भूतकाल — सामान्य):**
Use: Completed actions in the past
🇮🇳 मैंने कल खाना खाया।
🇬🇧 I **ate** food yesterday.
Formula: Subject + V2 (for all subjects)

**3. Simple Future Tense (भविष्यकाल — सामान्य):**
Use: Future plans, predictions, promises
🇮🇳 मैं कल आऊँगा।
🇬🇧 I **will come** tomorrow.
Formula: Subject + will + V1
rules: Simple Present: I/We/You/They + V1; He/She/It + V1+s/es
Simple Present Negative: Subject + do/does not + V1
Simple Past: Subject + V2 (same for all — went, ate, spoke)
Simple Past Negative: Subject + did not + V1 (base form)
Simple Future: Subject + will + V1 (same for all subjects)
Simple Future Negative: Subject + will not (won't) + V1
Key time words: Past: yesterday, ago, last; Future: tomorrow, next, soon
content.memoryTrick:
**P-P-F = Past-Present-Future**
• Present = V1 (+ s for He/She/It)
• Past = V2 (just change the verb)
• Future = will + V1
Simple tenses — सबसे straightforward!

examples.english: The sun rises in the east.
She goes to the gym every day.
I will change my job next year.

mistakes.why: Did के बाद base verb V1 (went नहीं, go चाहिए)
Will के बाद always base verb V1

speakingTips: रोज़ अपनी diary simple tenses में लिखो: 'Today I... Yesterday I... Tomorrow I will...'
3 facts simple present में बताओ: 'Water boils at 100 degrees.'
अपनी last week की activities simple past में describe करो

vocabulary.example: Yesterday I met an old friend.
Tomorrow will be a great day.

practice.hindi: मैं रोज़ सुबह 6 बजे उठता हूँ।
practice.english: I wake up at 6 AM every day.
alternatives: i get up at 6 am daily.

practice.hindi: वह अपने माता-पिता से बहुत प्यार करती है।
practice.english: She loves her parents very much.
alternatives: she loves her parents a lot.

practice.hindi: पानी 100 डिग्री पर उबलता है।
practice.english: Water boils at 100 degrees.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम रोज़ व्यायाम करते हो?
practice.english: Do you exercise every day?

practice.hindi: वह सुबह अखबार नहीं पढ़ता।
practice.english: He does not read the newspaper in the morning.
alternatives: he doesn't read newspaper in morning.

practice.hindi: मेरे पिता सरकारी नौकरी करते हैं।
practice.english: My father works in a government job.
alternatives: my father does a government job.

practice.hindi: पृथ्वी सूर्य के चारों ओर घूमती है।
practice.english: The Earth revolves around the Sun.

practice.hindi: हम हर रविवार मंदिर जाते हैं।
practice.english: We go to the temple every Sunday.
alternatives: we visit the temple every sunday.

practice.hindi: वह बहुत तेज़ बोलती है।
practice.english: She speaks very fast.

practice.hindi: क्या वह कॉफी पसंद करता है?
practice.english: Does he like coffee?

practice.hindi: मैं अभी खाना खा रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I am eating food right now.
alternatives: i am having food right now.

practice.hindi: वह ऑफिस में काम कर रही है।
practice.english: She is working in the office.
alternatives: she is working at the office.

practice.hindi: बच्चे बाहर खेल रहे हैं।
practice.english: The children are playing outside.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम अभी पढ़ रहे हो?
practice.english: Are you studying right now?

practice.hindi: वह अभी सो नहीं रहा।
practice.english: He is not sleeping right now.

practice.hindi: मैं इस हफ्ते मुंबई में हूँ।
practice.english: I am staying in Mumbai this week.
alternatives: i am in mumbai this week.

practice.hindi: कंपनी अभी नए कर्मचारी ले रही है।
practice.english: The company is hiring new employees.

practice.hindi: तुम क्या कर रहे हो?
practice.english: What are you doing?

practice.hindi: वह मेरी बात नहीं सुन रही।
practice.english: She is not listening to me.

practice.hindi: हम एक नया प्रोजेक्ट शुरू कर रहे हैं।
practice.english: We are starting a new project.
alternatives: we are launching a new project.

practice.hindi: मैं दिल्ली जा चुका हूँ।
practice.english: I have been to Delhi.

practice.hindi: उसने अभी-अभी खाना खाया है।
practice.english: She has just eaten food.

practice.hindi: हम तीन साल से दोस्त हैं।
practice.english: We have been friends for three years.
alternatives: we have been friends since three years.

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने अपना होमवर्क किया?
practice.english: Have you done your homework?

practice.hindi: उसने अभी तक काम खत्म नहीं किया।
practice.english: He has not finished the work yet.

practice.hindi: मैंने कभी झूठ नहीं बोला।
practice.english: I have never told a lie.

practice.hindi: वह आज तीन कप चाय पी चुकी है।
practice.english: She has had three cups of tea today.
alternatives: she has drunk three cups of tea today.

practice.hindi: मुझे अभी-अभी एक अच्छी खबर मिली है।
practice.english: I have just received good news.
alternatives: i have just got good news.

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने कभी विदेश देखा है?
practice.english: Have you ever been abroad?

practice.hindi: हम 2020 से इस शहर में रह रहे हैं।
practice.english: We have been living in this city since 2020.
alternatives: we have been staying here since 2020.

practice.hindi: मैं हर रात 11 बजे सोता हूँ।
practice.english: I sleep at 11 PM every night.
alternatives: i go to sleep at 11 pm every night.

practice.hindi: वह अभी मीटिंग में है।
practice.english: He is in a meeting right now.
alternatives: he is attending a meeting right now.

practice.hindi: मैंने आज सुबह जिम में व्यायाम किया।
practice.english: I have exercised at the gym this morning.
alternatives: i exercised at the gym this morning.

practice.hindi: वह रोज़ सुबह 10 किलोमीटर दौड़ता है।
practice.english: He runs 10 kilometres every morning.

practice.hindi: वे अभी टीवी देख रहे हैं।
practice.english: They are watching TV right now.

practice.hindi: मैंने यह किताब तीन बार पढ़ी है।
practice.english: I have read this book three times.
alternatives: i have read this book 3 times.

practice.hindi: वह हमेशा समय पर आती है।
practice.english: She always comes on time.

practice.hindi: तुम अभी क्या सोच रहे हो?
practice.english: What are you thinking about right now?
alternatives: what are you thinking right now?

practice.hindi: उसने इस कंपनी में 5 साल काम किया है।
practice.english: He has worked in this company for 5 years.
alternatives: he has been working here for 5 years.

practice.hindi: मैं अंग्रेज़ी सीखना बहुत ज़रूरी समझता हूँ।
practice.english: I think learning English is very important.
alternatives: i believe english learning is very important.

practice.hindi: वह रोज़ अपनी माँ को फोन करती है।
practice.english: She calls her mother every day.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम कभी क्रिकेट खेलते हो?
practice.english: Do you ever play cricket?

practice.hindi: वह पिछले एक घंटे से मेरा इंतज़ार कर रहा है।
practice.english: He has been waiting for me for the past one hour.
alternatives: he has been waiting for me for an hour.

practice.hindi: मुझे आज बहुत काम करना है।
practice.english: I have a lot of work to do today.
practice.hint: have + a lot of + noun + to do

practice.hindi: वह सच नहीं बोल रहा।
practice.english: He is not telling the truth.
